title: Status-System
description: An easy to use Status-System, for Servers with Folia / Paper forks.
body:
# Status-System

**A minimalist, high-performance plugin providing Minecraft players with customizable status indicators set via an intuitive GUI.**

## Key Features

* **Status Management:** Players select custom statuses from a GUI.
![Status-GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3758c0067674e22bf4ce5f6d37a1755dce7b9379.png)
* **PlaceholderAPI Integration:** Use **`%status_current%`** to display the status in chat, tab lists, etc.
![Status-Tab](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b74f2492029f382e1c402408ce19277341cb442.png)
* **Configurable:** Administrators define custom statuses with specific display names, icons, and permissions.
![Status-Create](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/880d1cc7c38e70eea1198f40bb39df89a2adea16.png)
* **Persistent:** Statuses are saved across sessions.
* **Compatibility:** Works on **Folia** and **Paper**.

## Commands & Permissions
### (Highlights)

| Role | Command Example | Key Permission |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Player | `/status` or `/st` | `status.use` |
| Admin | `/status create <key> <item> <display>` | `status.create` |
| Admin | `/status reload` | `status.reload` |

---

### **Placeholder**

**`%status_current%`**



### Depedencies (optional)

**We recommend** **to install Luckperms** **for a better experience!**

### **Support**

For bugs or support: https://discord.gg/Mkgz7YK7Y8
